messages.content: write a poem about missing you and sadness of not being there now but soon we will be together

The days go by so slow and long,
My heart aches for your touch so strong.
I miss the sound of your sweet voice,
The laughter that made my heart rejoice.

The skies are gray and dreary,
My heart is feeling oh so weary.
I long to feel your loving embrace,
To see the warmth of your sweet face.

But I know the day will come,
When we will once again be one.
And though right now we are apart,
I know soon we'll be back heart-to-heart.

So I'll hold on tight to love so true,
And patiently wait for me and you.
The sadness now may bring me low,
But soon we'll rise again and glow.

Through distance and time we will survive,
My love for you will forever thrive.
And one sweet day we'll reunite,
And live our lives in pure delight.
Incorporate Ice cream and love

With every lick of chocolate and cream,
My love for you is what it seems.
The sweetness of this ice cream treat,
Cannot compete with the love we meet.

With every scoop and every bite,
Our love grows stronger day and night.
Like the creamy texture on my tongue,
Our love is smooth and never undone.

In every flavor, in every cone,
Our love is sweeter than we've ever known.
It's in the sprinkles and the swirls,
Our love continues to unfurl.

So let us share this ice cream treat,
While our love continues to beat.
With every scoop and every lick,
Our love grows stronger and never quits.
poem about sadness that I cant be there for you in this time but soon that will be different

Oh, how my heart aches for you,
I wish I could be there, it's true.
But life's circumstances keep us apart,
And it tears me up, deep in my heart.

I long to hold you close and tight,
To be there for you, day and night.
But for now, I can only send love,
And pray to the heavens above.

Please know that you're not alone,
Together soon we'll be, in our own zone.
We'll hold each other, through thick and thin,
And our love will guide us from within.

The sadness now may linger on,
But soon it will be gone and done.
I'll be there for you, in body and soul,
And our love will make us whole.

So hold on tight and don't lose hope,
Together soon, no more will we mope.
Our love will conquer all, you'll see,
And forever, together we'll be.

Please know that you’re not alone,
Together soon we’ll be, in our own zone.
We’ll be next to each other, playing zelda.

Make the last sentence with ice cream and eating together

We'll sit side by side, enjoying ice cream's glaze, 
Playing some Zelda, lost in its beautiful maze.
another one but simpler

We'll savor scoops of ice cream, so sweet,
And enjoy playing Zelda, in each other's seat.
another one in simpler english

We'll eat ice cream and play Zelda together,
Sharing happy moments that will last forever.
another one

With bowls of ice cream in our hands,
We'll play Zelda, and find new lands.
another one

As we devour some ice cream, so cold,
We'll embark on a Zelda tale, so bold.
another one

With spoons of ice cream, we'll conquer Zelda,
Our love and teamwork, a force to behold.

Together soon we’ll be, in our own zone.

Alternative but with same ryming scheme

In no time, we'll be united again,
Together, our bond will always remain.
another one

Our separation is hard to bear,
But soon, we'll be back in each other's care.
another one

Though distance keeps us miles apart,
Our love will surely mend each broken heart.
another one

Until the day we're once again near,
Our love remains strong, and crystal clear.

Please know that you’re not alone,
Together soon we’ll be, in our own zone.

Same but other words

You're never far from my mind,
Soon we'll be together and feel so kind.
synonyms to "you are not alone"

- I'm always here for you.
- You have my love and support.
- I'm standing by your side.
- Together, we'll overcome this.
- You can count on me.
- I'm with you every step of the way.

Please know that you’re not alone,
Soon we will be together  in our own zone.
We’ll be next to each other, playing zelda.
While eating Ice cream 

finish the last sentence

Our love and joy will forever weld,
As we indulge in ice cream, our favorite eld.
another one

Together we'll share our favorite treat,
And enjoy playing Zelda without defeat.
another one

With each spoonful of creamy delight,
Our love for each other will always shine bright.
